leadText: The Protector (Japanese: プロテクター Protector) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It allows Rhydon to evolve into Rhyperior.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Rhydon to evolve into Rhyperior when used on it in Pokémon Legends: Arceus . Held item [ edit | edit source ] Causes Rhydon to evolve into Rhyperior when traded while holding it. This consumes the Protector.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Link Cable and Protector at Luminous Spring , Rhydon can be evolved into Rhyperior . This consumes the Link Cable and Protector. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A protective item of some sort. It is extremely stiff and heavy. It is loved by a certain Pokémon. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A protective item of some sort. It is extremely stiff and heavy. It's loved by a certain Pokémon.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S A heavy, durable piece of protective equipment. It allows a certain kind of Pokémon to evolve.
